mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diaries WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, mood = #{mood}, visibility = #{visibility}, weather = #{weather}, is_favorite = #{isFavorite}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM diaries
ORDER BY written_date DESC, diary_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT mood, COUNT(*) as count FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false AND mood IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mood
SELECT MONTH(written_date) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false AND YEAR(written_date) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(written_date) ORDER BY month
SELECT DISTINCT written_date FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY written_date DESC
